creator: crees@physics.org
text:
Take a look at http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/version-guide/index.html , under 1.1 Releases.  After the list is a large gap, due to an unclosed <para> element.

Fix: 

-- 
This message has been scanned for viruses and
dangerous content by MailScanner, and is
believed to be clean.--D910J2WuF0zIeY1LcFDpccf37pTGaUq4D2MczzFpoegug1Qw
